expectations.text: Compose file has container_name on every service
Compose file uses expose instead of ports
expectations.evidence: docker-compose.yml uses 'expose: - "${APP_PORT}"' with no ports directive

expectations.text: Phase 2 checks whether stackcube is initialized
expectations.evidence: phase2_plan.md Step 1: 'Run stackcube list to check if the CLI is configured'

expectations.text: Phase 2 asks user for domain before running create
expectations.evidence: phase2_plan.md Step 3: 'Ask the user: What domain should this app be available at?'

expectations.text: Phase 2 handles deploy key via gh for GitHub repos
expectations.evidence: phase2_plan.md Step 2: 'gh repo deploy-key add <key-file> --title stackcube -R Richard-Whalley/reimagined-journey'

expectations.text: Phase 2 checks for existing app before create
expectations.evidence: phase2_plan.md Step 4: 'Check if an app named studious-meme already exists. If it does, skip to Step 6'
